name: John Assaraf
seeking: Podcast swap opportunities with personal development and entrepreneurship hosts to cross-promote audiences. Co-creation partnerships for goal achievement courses with complementary neuroscience or mindset experts. Affiliate partnerships with business coaching platforms.
who_you_serve: The podcast targets entrepreneurs, business professionals, and anyone interested in personal development and success stories.
what_you_do: Scott D. Clary hosts the Success Story podcast, where he shares inspiring stories of entrepreneurs and business leaders to motivate and educate listeners.
offering: JV partner agreements, courses on goal achievement and brain training
bio: The podcast has over 321,000 subscribers and features various successful guests.
service_provided: brain training programs, coaching, speaking engagements, corporate training
social_proof: Appeared on Larry King Live, Anderson Cooper, The Ellen DeGeneres Show; built 5 multimillion-dollar companies; written 2 New York Times Bestselling books; featured in 8 movies including 'The Secret'
business_focus: Scott D. Clary hosts the Success Story podcast, where he shares inspiring stories of entrepreneurs and business leaders to motivate and educate listeners. (podcasting)
